overall.description: A first-person exploration of the USS Bowfin submarine memorial at Pearl Harbor in a high-fidelity game engine simulation. The camera approaches the vessel from the dock, ascends the metal gangway, and walks along the wooden deck toward the conning tower, showcasing the historic naval architecture in bright tropical sunlight.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on the USS Bowfin submarine moored at Pearl Harbor, viewed from the concrete dock. The camera walks steadily forward toward the metal gangway, with clear tropical water surrounding the vessel and mountains visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: metal gangway ramp leading to submarine deck

stepping from the gangway onto the wooden submarine deck

agents.ego_description: walking up the inclined metal gangway with diamond plate surface toward the submarine deck

textured metal walking surface with raised diamond pattern

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends the narrow metal gangway with diamond plate flooring and porthole-cut railings. The submarine hull falls away to the left as the camera climbs toward the deck, with the conning tower becoming visible at the top of the ramp.

scene_state.functional_zone: submarine deck with conning tower and deck gun

events.description: slowing approach to the deck hatch near the conning tower

agents.ego_description: walking along the wooden deck of the submarine toward the conning tower and forward hatch

entered.detail: wooden plank deck surface with yellow anti-slip strips
raised command structure with periscope and railing
open rectangular hatch with ladder leading below deck
black cylindrical mooring posts on the deck edges

segments.scene_description: Having reached the submarine deck, the camera walks forward along the wooden planks toward the conning tower. The deck features metal bollards and an open hatch with a ladder, while the harbor water is visible on both sides of the narrow deck.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a concrete dock onto the narrow deck of the USS Bowfin submarine under bright tropical sunlight. It begins with a steady walk across the dock toward the vessel, with clear harbor water and distant mountains framing the approach. As the camera reaches the ship, it ascends a narrow metal gangway with diamond plate flooring, causing the submarine hull to fall away to the left while the conning tower emerges at the top of the ramp. The scene then shifts to the wooden planks of the main deck, moving forward past metal bollards and an open hatch with a ladder. Finally, the camera continues its path toward the conning tower, flanked on both sides by the shimmering waters of Pearl Harbor.
